title: Department Manager Vacancy at Star Bazaar Global Group - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Star Bazaar Global Group - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Star Bazaar Global Group invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Department Manager at our Meerut location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Star Bazaar Global Group:
Star Bazaar Global Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Star Bazaar Global Group!
